details.callToWorship: We Have Come into His House #361

list: Thanks to Women on Mission and all who came out last week to decorate for today’s fellowship meal and Vacation Bible School. The work is not done, but many hands make it lighter… PLEASE come join us and help out.

Today is Senior Sunday. In additional to high school seniors, Women on Mission will be recognizing our kids that are transitioning from pre-school, kindergarten, 6th grade, 8th grade and graduating college.

Our 2026 VBS, Emerald Crossing, is May 31-June 3 from 6:00-8:00 PM nightly. Please sign up to help on the sheets in the foyer. If you ordered a VBS tee, those are $15 for XL and smaller, $17 for XXL and larger. Please give your payment to Ryan ASAP.
